items.title: A Hong Kong Tragedy — and a Test for the U.S.
items.description: In the wake of Jimmy Lai’s sentencing, the U.S. must stand up for democratic values.

items.title: The Best Chagos Deal Is No Deal
items.description: The Trump administration should step up political pressure on Starmer to change course.

items.title: How Sheikh Tahnoon Bought the UAE’s Way into Trump World
items.description: When Trump won the 2024 election, Tahnoon saw his opportunity to influence the U.S. government.

items.title: Thirty Candles for the Internet’s Foundation
items.description: Internet free speech is celebrating its 30th birthday — if Section 230’s opponents don’t spoil the party, that is.

items.title: Goodbye, Kostyantynivka
items.description: Not too long ago, the eastern Ukrainian city helped build my family. Now, the town is little more than ruins.
